name: Pediatric Brain Ultrasound
description: Cranial ultrasound for evaluation of neonatal intracranial pathology through the anterior fontanelle

findings.technique: Cranial ultrasound was performed through the anterior fontanelle in coronal and sagittal planes.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.
findings.limitations: None. Evaluation limited to structures accessible through the anterior fontanelle.

sections.name: Lateral Ventricles
sections.content: The lateral ventricles are [normal in size / not dilated / no ventriculomegaly]. The ventricular walls are [smooth / no irregularities].

sections.name: Third and Fourth Ventricles
sections.content: The third and fourth ventricles are [normal in size / not dilated]. No obstruction identified.

sections.name: Brain Parenchyma
sections.content: The brain parenchyma demonstrates [normal echogenicity / no intraventricular hemorrhage / no periventricular leukomalacia]. The cortical sulci are [developing normally / visible].

sections.name: Germinal Matrix
sections.content: The germinal matrix is [not prominent / no hemorrhage / no calcification]. No germinal matrix hemorrhage.

sections.name: Cerebellum
sections.content: The cerebellum is [normal in size / normal echogenicity]. The cerebellar vermis is [intact / normal].

sections.name: Midline Structures
sections.content: The midline structures are [midline / no shift]. The corpus callosum is [intact / visible].

impression:
1. Normal pediatric cranial ultrasound.
2. No intraventricular hemorrhage or structural abnormality identified.
author: RadReport Templates
